    GameCommandPane - Class in tailFinder.view.game.debug
    Command input panel for debug commands during gameplay.

    GamePane - Class in tailFinder.view.game
    Main game view pane containing the game world visualization and debug/command overlays.

    Gets the entire map data as a 2D byte array.
